ksa_text: Skill in managing data handling processes, applying data handling tools and techniques, aggregating data, and managing data throughout its lifecycle.

dcwf.top_element_label: Develop and document supply chain risks for critical system elements, as appropriate.

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Develop and document supply chain risks for critical system elements, as appropriate.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: Data Quality is a primary or secondary domain for the Domain Data Lead. This skill KSA is within scope for the role's expected competency profile and seniority level (team lead).

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No internal inconsistency identified. Domain scope (Data Quality), seniority fit, and signal level are internally consistent with inclusion.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Pass 1 signal is moderate (composite 0.46). External reviewers may question whether this specific skill KSA is sufficiently distinctive for the Domain Data Lead versus adjacent roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: DAMA-DMBOK Data Quality Management chapter and industry surveys confirm data quality competencies for quality-focused leadership roles.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Upheld: moderate framework signal is consistent with Data Quality appearing in job postings and role definition literature for Domain Data Lead.

decision_rationale: Data Quality skill KSA is within scope for the Domain Data Lead at the team lead tier. Seniority fit is appropriate. All three evaluation passes support inclusion.
